creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
$ cat /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf
OPTIONS_UNSET+= NLS EXAMPLES
#OPTIONS_SET+= WAYLAND X11
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= java=11 mysql=10.5m php=8.0 python=3.8 python3=3.8 llvm=13
WITH_MPM=event
.if ${.CURDIR:M*/x11/sterm}
EXTRA_PATCHES+= /distfiles/local-patches/x11/sterm/config_def_h.patch
.endif
.if ${.CURDIR:M*/www/firefox}
TMP_DEFAULT_VERSIONS= ${DEFAULT_VERSIONS:Nllvm=13}
DEFAULT_VERSIONS= $TMP_DEFAULT_VERSIONS
.endif
.if ${.CURDIR:M*/devel/openjdk11}
TMP_DEFAULT_VERSIONS= ${DEFAULT_VERSIONS:Nllvm=12}
DEFAULT_VERSIONS= $TMP_DEFAULT_VERSIONS
.endif



$ cat /etc/make.conf
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= java=11 mysql=10.5m php=8.0 python=3.8 python3=3.8 llvm=13
#PORTS_MODULES=graphics/drm-kmod net/wireguard-kmod
